git_username_fix.description: Fix Git repeatedly asking for username when SSH keys already exist.

steps.note: If remote uses HTTPS, Git will ALWAYS ask for username even with SSH keys.
Once remote is SSH, Git will NEVER ask for username again.
If this fails, SSH agent may not be loaded.
Only needed if SSH authentication fails.

git_username_fix.root_cause: Remote URL is still HTTPS, causing Git to ignore SSH keys.
git_username_fix.permanent_fix: Ensure remote uses SSH format: git@github.com:USERNAME/REPO.git
